content:
# Tasks Document

- [ ] 1. 创建存储抽象接口（StorageProvider & TokenRepository）
  - 文件：src/storage/interfaces.py
  - 定义 StorageProvider Protocol（交易记录、日志、统计查询）
  - 定义 TokenRepository Protocol（Token 生命周期管理）
  - 定义 LogSink Protocol（日志写入接口）
  - 定义相关 Pydantic 模型（TokenInfo, LogEntry, LogQuery, TradeQuery）
  - 目的：建立存储层抽象，支持 Lite/Enterprise 双模式切换
  - _Leverage: Python typing.Protocol, Pydantic BaseModel_
  - _Requirements: 9.1-非功能性-代码架构-Modular Design_
  - _Prompt: Role: Python Architect specializing in type systems and interface design | Task: Create comprehensive storage abstraction interfaces following requirements, use Python typing.Protocol and Pydantic for type safety | Restrictions: Interfaces must be pure abstract, no implementation in this file, follow Python type hint best practices | Success: All protocols are well-defined with clear method signatures, Pydantic models validated, no implementation details leaked_

- [ ] 2. 实现 Lite 存储层（LiteStorageProvider & LiteTokenRepo）
  - 文件：src/storage/lite_storage.py, src/storage/lite_token_repo.py
  - 实现 SQLite 交易记录查询和写入（复用 daily_limit_manager 连接池）
  - 实现 JSON 文件存储 user_tokens.json（带 filelock 并发安全）
  - 实现 SQLite 日志表（logs/app.db）和查询接口
  - 实现 Token 生命周期管理（创建、吊销、验证、列表）
  - 目的：提供轻量级存储实现，无需额外服务依赖
  - _Leverage: src/utils/daily_limit_manager.py, src/utils/logger.py, filelock library_
  - _Requirements: 9.1-非功能性-代码架构, 9.2-性能, 9.3-可靠性_
  - _Prompt: Role: Python Backend Developer with SQLite and file I/O expertise | Task: Implement Lite storage providers wrapping existing SQLite and JSON logic with proper error handling and concurrency safety | Restrictions: Must reuse existing database connections, implement file locking for JSON operations, handle all SQLite errors gracefully | Success: All storage operations work correctly, concurrent access safe, error handling comprehensive, passes integration tests_

- [ ] 3. 扩展日志系统（FileHandler + SQLiteLogSink）
  - 文件：src/utils/logger.py（扩展）, src/utils/sqlite_log_sink.py（新增）
  - 添加 RotatingFileHandler（logs/app.log，按天切分，保留7天）
  - 添加 SQLiteLogSink（写入 logs/app.db 的 app_logs 表）
  - 实现 LogSink 接口供 StorageProvider 调用
  - 保持向后兼容（现有代码无需修改）
  - 目的：实现日志持久化，支持查询和审计
  - _Leverage: Python logging.handlers.RotatingFileHandler, sqlite3, src/storage/interfaces.py_
  - _Requirements: 5.5-日志查看, 9.2-性能, 9.4-可靠性_
  - _Prompt: Role: Python Developer specializing in logging systems and handlers | Task: Extend logging module to support file rotation and SQLite storage while maintaining backward compatibility | Restrictions: Cannot break existing logger.get_logger() calls, must not introduce performance overhead, handle disk full gracefully | Success: Logs written to both file and SQLite simultaneously, query interface works, rotation correct, no breaking changes_

- [ ] 4. 创建 FastAPI 应用骨架和认证路由
  - 文件：src/api/app.py, src/api/routers/auth.py, src/api/deps.py
  - 初始化 FastAPI 应用（OpenAPI 文档、CORS、异常处理）
  - 实现 auth_router（login 验证、Token 创建/吊销/列表）
  - 实现 get_current_user 依赖（Token 校验、角色判断）
  - 实现 Admin/User 权限装饰器
  - 目的：建立 API 基础架构和认证体系
  - _Leverage: fastapi.FastAPI, fastapi.Depends, src/storage/interfaces.py, src/config/config_manager.py_
  - _Requirements: 1-API认证, 2-策略启停, 9.3-安全_
  - _Prompt: Role: FastAPI Developer with authentication and authorization expertise | Task: Create FastAPI application skeleton and authentication router with proper dependency injection and RBAC | Restrictions: Must use Depends for dependency injection, validate all inputs with Pydantic, enforce RBAC with clear role separation, return standardized error responses | Success: API starts successfully, auth endpoints work, token validation correct, roles enforced, OpenAPI docs generated_

- [ ] 5. 实现策略管理路由和服务
  - 文件：src/api/routers/strategy.py, src/services/strategy_service.py
  - 实现 strategy_router（start/stop/params/list/detail）
  - 实现 StrategyService（封装 TradingEngine 控制调用）
  - 实现参数验证和更新（复用 Config 模型）
  - 添加策略操作审计日志（操作人、时间、变更内容）
  - 目的：提供策略控制 API
  - _Leverage: src/trading_engine.py, src/config/config_manager.py, src/storage/interfaces.py_
  - _Requirements: 2-策略启停, 3-参数调整, 8-策略管理界面, 9.3-安全, 9.4-可靠性_
  - _Prompt: Role: Full-stack Developer with trading system and FastAPI expertise | Task: Implement strategy management router and service with proper TradingEngine integration and audit logging | Restrictions: Must validate parameters before update, prevent invalid state transitions, log all management operations, handle TradingEngine exceptions gracefully | Success: All strategy endpoints work correctly, parameters validated, audit logs created, error handling robust, passes integration tests_

- [ ] 6. 实现信号查询路由和服务
  - 文件：src/api/routers/signal.py, src/services/signal_service.py
  - 实现 signal_router（latest/history，支持 filter/pagination）
  - 实现 SignalService（读取 TradingEngine.signal_history）
  - 支持按时间、策略ID、信号类型、信心度过滤
  - 实现分页和总数返回
  - 目的：提供信号查询 API
  - _Leverage: src/trading_engine.py, src/storage/interfaces.py_
  - _Requirements: 4-信号查询, 6-仪表盘_
  - _Prompt: Role: Python Backend Developer with FastAPI and data filtering expertise | Task: Implement signal query router and service with comprehensive filtering and pagination support | Restrictions: Must not block on history queries, use efficient pagination, serialize signal objects correctly, support all filter combinations | Success: Signal queries return correct results, filtering works, pagination efficient, response format matches schema_

- [ ] 7. 实现日志查询路由和 SSE 推送
  - 文件：src/api/routers/logs.py, src/services/log_service.py
  - 实现 log_router（GET /api/logs 支持多条件过滤）
  - 实现 SSE 端点（/api/logs/stream，推送新日志）
  - 实现 LogService（调用 StorageProvider.query_logs）
  - 支持 level/type/keyword/time range 过滤
  - 目的：提供日志查询和实时监控
  - _Leverage: src/storage/interfaces.py, fastapi.responses.StreamingResponse_
  - _Requirements: 5-日志查看, 9.2-性能_
  - _Prompt: Role: Python Developer with FastAPI streaming and SSE expertise | Task: Implement log query router with filtering and SSE real-time push endpoint | Restrictions: SSE must handle client disconnect gracefully, query performance must be < 1s for 1000 logs, memory efficient for streaming, support all filter types | Success: Log queries work efficiently, SSE delivers logs in real-time without memory leaks, client reconnection handled, passes load tests_

- [ ] 8. 创建状态汇总路由
  - 文件：src/api/routers/status.py, src/services/status_service.py
  - 实现 status_router（GET /api/status/summary）
  - 聚合账户余额、持仓、策略状态、信号统计、日限额
  - 支持普通用户和管理员不同视图（部分字段脱敏）
  - 目的：提供仪表盘数据 API
  - _Leverage: src/trading_engine.py, src/config/config_manager.py, src/storage/interfaces.py_
  - _Requirements: 6-仪表盘, 7-策略管理界面_
  - _Prompt: Role: Python Backend Developer with data aggregation and FastAPI expertise | Task: Create status summary endpoint that aggregates data from multiple sources for dashboard display | Restrictions: Must handle partial failures gracefully, return unified error messages, respect user role for data visibility, optimize for < 200ms response | Success: Status API returns complete dashboard data, handles errors, respects roles, response time meets target_

- [ ] 9. 初始化 Vue3 前端项目
  - 目录：frontend/
  - 创建 Vue3 + TypeScript + Vite 项目
  - 安装依赖（Element Plus, Axios, Pinia, Vue Router）
  - 配置项目结构（router, stores, views, components, api）
  - 配置代理和 API baseURL
  - 目的：建立前端开发框架
  - _Leverage: Vue3, Vite, TypeScript, Element Plus_
  - _Requirements: 6-仪表盘, 7-策略管理界面, 8-日志中心, 9-用户权限_
  - _Prompt: Role: Frontend Architect with Vue3 and TypeScript expertise | Task: Initialize Vue3 TypeScript project with proper structure and all required dependencies for admin console | Restrictions: Must use Vue3 composition API, configure TypeScript strict mode, set up proper module aliases, configure dev proxy | Success: Project builds successfully, all dependencies installed, dev server runs, can make API calls to backend_

- [ ] 10. 实现 Vue3 认证和 API 客户端
  - 文件：frontend/src/stores/auth.ts, frontend/src/api/client.ts
  - 使用 Pinia 创建 authStore（Token 存储、登录、角色判断）
  - 使用 Axios 创建 API 客户端（拦截器添加 Token、处理 401）
  - 实现 Router Guard（基于角色路由保护）
  - 目的：前端认证和 API 通信基础
  - _Leverage: pinia, axios, vue-router, Element Plus_
  - _Requirements: 1-API认证, 7-用户权限_
  - _Prompt: Role: Vue3 Developer with authentication and state management expertise | Task: Implement authentication store and API client with proper token management and router guards | Restrictions: Must use Pinia for state management, implement proper token refresh logic, handle 401 gracefully, use TypeScript for all stores | Success: Auth store works correctly, API client injects token automatically, router guards protect routes, types are properly defined_

- [ ] 11. 实现 Vue3 仪表盘页面
  - 文件：frontend/src/views/Dashboard.vue, frontend/src/stores/dashboard.ts
  - 使用 Element Plus 布局（ElRow/ElCol/ElCard）
  - 展示账户余额、持仓、策略状态、最新信号、日限额的卡片
  - 实现数据轮询（setInterval，可配置间隔，5-10秒）
  - 添加加载状态和错误提示
  - 目的：可视化监控交易机器人状态
  - _Leverage: Element Plus, Pinia, Axios_
  - _Requirements: 6-仪表盘, 4-信号查询_
  - _Prompt: Role: Vue3 Frontend Developer with UI/UX expertise | Task: Create dashboard page with data visualization and real-time updates using Element Plus components and Pinia store | Restrictions: Must use Element Plus components consistently, implement proper loading/error states, optimize polling to prevent memory leaks, responsive design | Success: Dashboard displays all metrics correctly, updates in real-time, handles errors gracefully, responsive on mobile, passes visual tests_

- [ ] 12. 实现 Vue3 策略管理页面
  - 文件：frontend/src/views/Strategy.vue, frontend/src/stores/strategy.ts
  - 策略列表表格（ElTable）显示状态、参数、操作按钮
  - 策略详情抽屉（ElDrawer）显示完整信息和参数表单
  - 启停按钮（Start/Stop）调用 API
  - 参数编辑表单（ElForm）验证和提交
  - 权限控制（普通用户只读，管理员可编辑）
  - 目的：直观管理交易策略
  - _Leverage: Element Plus, Pinia, axios_
  - _Requirements: 7-策略管理界面, 2-策略启停, 3-参数调整_
  - _Prompt: Role: Vue3 Developer with CRUD operations and form handling expertise | Task: Create strategy management page with list, details, and CRUD operations using Element Plus components | Restrictions: Must use Element Plus consistent with dashboard, implement form validation, show loading states during API calls, differentiate UI by user role, handle concurrent updates | Success: All strategy operations work correctly, forms validate properly, UI updates reflect server state, role-based access controls work, passes E2E tests_

- [ ] 13. 实现 Vue3 日志中心页面
  - 文件：frontend/src/views/Logs.vue, frontend/src/stores/logs.ts
  - 标签页切换系统日志/交易日志
  - 过滤器（级别、类型、关键字、时间范围）
  - 日志表格（ElTable）支持分页
  - 日志详情弹窗（ElDialog）
  - 可选 SSE 实时模式开关
  - 目的：日志查看和故障排查
  - _Leverage: Element Plus, Pinia, axios, EventSource_
  - _Requirements: 8-日志中心, 5-日志查看_
  - _Prompt: Role: Vue3 Developer with data filtering and real-time features expertise | Task: Create log center with filtering, pagination, and optional SSE real-time updates | Restrictions: Must implement efficient filtering (client+server), handle large log sets gracefully, SSE must handle reconnections, support multi-condition filtering | Success: Log filtering works efficiently, pagination correct, SSE delivers real-time updates, detail modal shows full information, passes integration tests_

- [ ] 14. 实现 Vue3 用户管理页面（Admin）
  - 文件：frontend/src/views/Users.vue, frontend/src/stores/users.ts
  - Token 列表（ElTable）显示创建时间、状态、权限
  - 生成 Token 表单（ElForm，输入标签、权限、有效期）
  - 吊销 Token 按钮（confirm 确认）
  - 仅管理员可见（v-if="isAdmin"）
  - 目的：管理用户访问权限
  - _Leverage: Element Plus, Pinia, axios_
  - _Requirements: 9-用户权限, 1-API认证_
  - _Prompt: Role: Vue3 Developer with admin interfaces and security expertise | Task: Create user management page for admin with token generation and revocation using Element Plus components | Restrictions: Must hide from non-admin users, implement confirmation dialogs for destructive actions, show clear token information, handle token generation errors gracefully | Success: Token management works correctly, UI only visible to admins, confirmation dialogs prevent accidents, token display clear and informative, passes security tests_

- [ ] 15. 集成测试和性能优化
  - 文件：tests/test_api_integration.py, tests/test_storage.py
  - API 集成测试（httpx.AsyncClient 测试所有路由）
  - Storage Provider 切换测试（Lite/Enterprise）
  - 性能测试（locust 模拟并发用户）
  - SSE 压力测试（100+ 客户端）
  - Vue3 E2E 测试（Playwright 测试关键流程）
  - 目的：确保系统质量和性能达标
  - _Leverage: pytest, httpx, locust, playwright_
  - _Requirements: 所有功能需求, 9.2-性能, 9.4-可靠性_
  - _Prompt: Role: QA/Performance Engineer with comprehensive testing expertise | Task: Create integration tests, performance tests, and E2E tests covering all features and NFRs | Restrictions: Must test both storage modes, validate all API endpoints, simulate realistic load, verify SSE under pressure, test critical user journeys | Success: All tests pass, performance meets targets (<200ms API, <5s SSE), no memory leaks, load test shows 10+ concurrent users supported, E2E tests cover all critical flows_
